hooks.command:
WIKI=""; for d in "$WIKI_ROOT" /Users/jacob/Desktop/LLM-WIKI/JACOB-LLM-WIKI /Users/wellbing/Desktop/LLM-WIKI/JACOB-LLM-WIKI /home/jacob/Obsidian/LLM-Wiki; do [ -n "$d" ] && [ -d "$d/Projects/realtime-wait" ] && { WIKI="$d"; break; }; done; [ -n "$WIKI" ] || exit 0; W="$WIKI/Projects/realtime-wait"; D=$(grep -m1 '^## [0-9]' "$W/log.md" 2>/dev/null); R=$(awk '/^## [0-9]/{c++} c==1{print} c==2{exit}' "$W/log.md" 2>/dev/null | grep '^- \*\*' | sed -E 's/^- \*\*([^*]+)\*\*.*/- \1/'); O=$(awk '/^## 열린 과제/{f=1;next} /^## /{f=0} f&&/^### /{print}' "$W/Next-Tasks.md" 2>/dev/null | sed -E 's/^### /- /'); printf '최근 작업 로그(%s):
%s

열린 과제:
%s' "$D" "$R" "$O" | jq -Rs '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",additionalContext:("[realtime-wait 위키 기억 — 상세 정본은 위키 Projects/realtime-wait/ 참조]

"+.)}}'

WIKI=""; for d in "$WIKI_ROOT" /Users/jacob/Desktop/LLM-WIKI/JACOB-LLM-WIKI /Users/wellbing/Desktop/LLM-WIKI/JACOB-LLM-WIKI /home/jacob/Obsidian/LLM-Wiki; do [ -n "$d" ] && [ -d "$d/.git" ] && [ -d "$d/Projects/realtime-wait" ] && { WIKI="$d"; break; }; done; [ -n "$WIKI" ] || exit 0; dirty=$(git -C "$WIKI" status --porcelain 2>/dev/null); unpushed=$(git -C "$WIKI" log --oneline '@{u}..HEAD' 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$dirty" ] && [ -z "$unpushed" ]; then exit 0; fi; echo "위키(JACOB-LLM-WIKI)에 저장 안 된 변경이 있습니다. 이번 세션 작업을 Projects/realtime-wait/log.md에 기록하고 커밋·푸시한 뒤 종료하세요."; exit 2
